message:
feat(fcp-core): add payload_hash field to ConnectorBinaryTransmissionInfo for end-to-end decode verification

Adds an optional `payload_hash: Option<[u8; 32]>` field to
ConnectorBinaryTransmissionInfo with backward-compatible serde
(default + skip_serializing_if).  This allows RaptorQ-encoded
connector artifacts to carry an end-to-end blake3 hash so the
decoder can verify reassembled payload integrity.

Builder-style `with_payload_hash()` method for ergonomic construction.
New test verifies deserialization gracefully handles missing field.

Propagation across the codebase:
- ObjectTransmissionInfo in fcp-store/symbol_store.rs gets the field
  and round-trips it through from_oti()/to_oti().
- All test fixtures and bench stubs across fcp-store (benches,
  object_store tests, symbol_store tests, no_mock_integration),
  fcp-e2e, and fcp-registry updated with `payload_hash: None` to
  satisfy the new struct field requirement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

                 source_blocks: 1,
